data.title: CoinSwitch granted court approval to retrieve $5M held by WazirX post-hack. WazirX's loss-sharing scheme appeal denied.
data.description: A recent ruling has upheld CoinSwitch's right to recoup frozen funds and has rejected WazirX's appeal regarding a proposed loss-sharing restructuring plan. This decision allows CoinSwitch to potentially recover a significant amount of money, while dismissing WazirX's efforts to implement a restructuring plan that would involve sharing losses. The ruling has significant implications for both companies' financial positions and dispute resolution processes.

data.title: Levi Strauss stock fell despite positive Q3 earnings. Analysts remain bullish, with price targets ranging from $27-$33.
data.description: Levi Strauss & Co (NYSE: LEVI) shares saw a significant decline during early trading despite reporting better-than-expected third-quarter earnings. The stock is facing a downturn due to negative market sentiment. Key analysts have shared their insights on LEVI:  - JPMorgan's Matthew Boss upgraded the stock to Overweight and raised the price target from $23 to $33.  - BofA Securities' Christopher Nardone maintained a Buy rating with a price target of $27.  - Dana Telsey from Telsey Advisory Group kept an Outperform rating and a price target of $27.  - Needham's Tom Nikic reaffirmed a Buy rating with a target price of $28.  JPMorgan noted that Levi Strauss reported adjusted earnings of 34 cents per share, surpassing the Street's forecast of 31 cents per share. The earnings beat was driven by a 7% year-on-year growth in organic revenue and a 110 basis point increase in gross margin. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: James Manning launches NYC mayoral campaign, vows tax cuts, and homelessness solution. Faith leader aims to restore city's faith and affordability.
data.description: James Manning has announced his commitment to challenging established politicians with a grassroots strategy to revive trust, affordability, and equality in New York City. On October 10, 2025, the Harlem-based faith leader and proponent for working-class households, James David Manning, revealed his plan. Through grassroots efforts, Manning aims to address key community issues and offer fresh perspectives in the political landscape.

data.title: Odyssey Resources updates upcoming AGM amid Canada Post strike; Meeting on Oct 21 at 10am in Toronto. Meeting materials available online.
data.description: Odyssey Resources Limited (NEX: ODX.H) has announced that the ongoing Canada Post labor strike has caused postal service disruption, affecting the delivery of Meeting Materials for their upcoming annual general and special meeting. The meeting is scheduled for Tuesday, October 21, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. (Toronto time) at Dundee Corporation's offices in Toronto. To address this issue, the Notice of Meeting, Circular, form of proxy, and related materials have been electronically filed on the Company’s SEDAR+ profile at www.sedarplus.ca. Additionally, these Meeting Materials can be accessed on the Company’s website at https://odysseyresources.com/s/agm.asp.html.

data.title: UiPath stock (PATH) soared 40% on new AI partnerships, industry recognition. The company announced collaboration with OpenAI to simplify AI development.
data.description: UiPath, Inc. (NYSE: PATH) saw its shares surge by a notable 40% over the past week due to a series of positive developments. The increase was primarily driven by new partnerships and industry acknowledgments. Investor sentiment significantly improved following the news of collaborations and integrations with prominent AI firms, which bolstered UiPath stock. Among the key highlights was UiPath's significant partnership with OpenAI to enhance customer returns on investment by streamlining AI agent development and deployment. Additionally, the company secured deals with Snowflake, Inc. These strategic AI alliances have spurred strong momentum for UiPath, indicating a positive outlook for the company's trajectory. For more details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Inventor from St. George, Ga., develops WILIAMS INVENTION to install trailer doors easily, helping solo workers.
data.description: An inventor from St. George, Georgia, discussed his innovation in Pittsburgh on October 10, 2025, stating, "Attempting to install trailer doors alone proved challenging, leading me to create the WILIAMS INVENTION. This design simplifies the process, enabling a single individual to easily install a trailer door." This invention offers enhanced efficiency and ease in door installation, potentially benefiting many in the industry.

data.title: Mutual of Omaha ranked #1 for customer satisfaction in J.D. Power 2025 U.S. Individual Life Insurance Study.
data.description: Mutual of Omaha, based in Omaha, Neb., was recognized as the best individual life insurance provider for customer satisfaction in the J.D. Power 2025 U.S. Individual Life Insurance Study. The study evaluated 23 prominent carriers in the industry. J.D. Power assessed customer satisfaction in eight important areas such as trust, ease of transactions, digital interactions, customer service, issue resolution, product variety, and service availability. Mutual of Omaha stood out as the leader, showcasing a strong commitment to providing exceptional customer experiences.

data.title: Delta Air Lines (NYSE: DAL) exceeds Q3 expectations with operating revenue of $16.7B, GAAP EPS of $2.17, and adjusted EPS of $1.71. Forecasting total revenue growth of 2-4% in December quarter, with adjusted EPS expected at $1.60-$1.90. Operating margin projected at 10.5-12%. Co. narrows adjusted EPS guidance to $6.00 for the year.
data.description: Delta Air Lines Inc. (NYSE: DAL) reported strong third-quarter financial results, surpassing expectations. The airline recorded operating revenue of $16.7 billion, a 6% increase year-over-year. GAAP EPS was $2.17, up by 10% from last year, while adjusted EPS exceeded estimates at $1.71. For the upcoming December quarter, Delta anticipates revenue growth of 2% to 4% and projects adjusted EPS to fall between $1.60 and $1.90, aiming at an operating margin of 10.5% to 12%. The company has adjusted its full-year EPS guidance to $6.00. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Major banks including Goldman Sachs, Citi & Bank of America to explore blockchain assets backed by G7 currencies, post GENIUS Act approval.
data.description: Major banks including Goldman Sachs, Citigroup, UBS, Deutsche Bank, and Bank of America have formed a consortium to explore blockchain-based assets pegged to G7 currencies. The initiative aims to develop tokenized settlement systems backed by the U.S. dollar, euro, and other G7 currencies, marking one of the largest collaborative efforts by banks to date. This move follows the passing of the GENIUS Act by President Donald Trump's administration, allowing U.S. banks to issue and hold blockchain-backed currencies under clear regulatory oversight. Citigroup also recently made a strategic investment in BVNK, a stablecoin infrastructure company, to capitalize on rising institutional demand for stablecoin settlement. BVNK's cross-border payments platform facilitates conversions between fiat and digital assets for banks and fintech firms.

data.title: Moody's Chief Economist warns US job market is weakening without BLS data. Lack of info hinders Fed decisions on rates.
data.description: Moody's Analytics Chief Economist Mark Zandi has expressed concerns about the weakening U.S. job market, stating that it is deteriorating further based on analysis of private-sector data. The official September jobs report from the Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) has not been released due to the government shutdown, which poses a significant challenge for economic policymakers. Zandi emphasized the critical impact of the lack of economic data on decision-making, particularly when the job market is struggling, and the Federal Reserve is approaching a crucial meeting. This data blackout complicates the Fed's ability to determine interest rates accurately. Zandi highlighted, "Not having the BLS jobs data poses a serious problem in evaluating the economy's health." For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
